summary: Full-stack Software Engineer with 5+ years shipping production systems at scale, including AI platforms serving 50,000+ users. Proven expertise designing and deploying end-to-end solutions from elegant user interfaces to robust cloud infrastructure, with deep specialization in autonomous agent systems, rapid iteration, and high-quality data pipelines. Passionate about building products that delight users through thoughtful engineering and seamless integration.

bullet_overrides.24h-evolving-code: Designed and shipped a self-evolving code system (generator/evaluator loop) that accelerated development velocity and reduced iteration cycles to under 24 hours through CI/CD automation with GitHub Actions—demonstrating the kind of rapid, high-quality iteration Apple values.
bullet_overrides.24h-aws-infra: Delivered end-to-end multi-tenant AWS cloud infrastructure for enterprise customers, reducing provisioning costs by 50% through automated resource management and tenant isolation—building reliable, scalable systems that power production workloads.
bullet_overrides.24h-customer-collab: Collaborated directly with customers to scope requirements, remove deployment blockers, and accelerate rollouts; codified deployment playbooks and runbooks to standardize operational response and ensure consistent, high-quality user experiences across production systems.
bullet_overrides.mdt-platform: Led end-to-end product development and launched a production platform that increased user engagement by 30%; built and integrated intelligent chatbot agents in collaboration with stakeholders to deliver seamless, intuitive user workflows.
bullet_overrides.mdt-fullstack: Scoped and delivered data-driven features across the full stack—from responsive front-end interfaces to optimized backend systems—coordinating cross-functional teams to prioritize roadmap items and ensure stable, rapid rollouts at scale.

skill_emphasis: AWS (EC2, SES, Aurora Serverless, IAM, SCPs)
